# EventsDomain

> India's B2B Event Sponsorship & Partnership Marketplace

## About

EventsDomain connects event organizers with brands, sponsors, and partners seeking sponsorship and collaboration opportunities. Unlike ticketing platforms, we focus exclusively on sponsorship partnerships, brand collaborations, and advertising opportunities at events across India and international locations.

## Company

- Name: EventsDomain
- Website: https://eventsdomain.com
- Contact: hello@eventsdomain.com
- Founded: 2025
- Location: India

## Platform Statistics

- 16+ sponsorship opportunities listed (and growing)
- 106 sponsorship packages available
- 703 sponsorship benefits across all packages
- Events across 10+ Indian cities and international locations
- 9 registered organizers

## Pages

- [Home](/): India's B2B sponsorship marketplace.
- [Events](/events): Browse all sponsorship opportunities.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Subscription plans for event organizers.
- [About](/about): Company information and team.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with us.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms and conditions.

## Event Categories

- Business (Conferences, Summits, Corporate Meetings, Trade Shows)
- Entertainment (Music Concerts, Comedy Shows, Live Shows, Nightlife, Esports, Performing Arts)
- Festivals & Community (Cultural Festivals, Food Festivals, Film Festivals, Religious Festivals, Community Events)
- Sports & Fitness (Sports Events, Fitness & Wellness)
- Education (Workshops, Seminars, Career Fairs, Literature Festivals, Academic Events)
- Technology (Tech Events, Startup Events, Science Exhibitions)
- Fashion (Fashion Shows, Shopping Festivals)
- Arts & Culture (Art Festivals, Theatre, Dance, Exhibitions)
- Health & Wellness (Fitness Events, Wellness Programs)
- Charity & Social Causes (Fundraising Events, Awareness Campaigns)

## Sponsorship Types

- Cash Sponsorship - Direct monetary investment in events
- Barter/In-kind Sponsorship - Product or service exchange
- Hybrid Sponsorship - Combination of cash and barter

## Sponsorship Package Categories

- Title Sponsorship - Premium brand association as the event title sponsor
- Co-Sponsor - Secondary brand sponsorship alongside title sponsor
- Associate Sponsor - Brand association at an associate level
- Powered By - Category-specific brand ownership
- Media Partner - Promotional and media coverage partnership
- Venue Partner - Venue and infrastructure partnership
- Exhibition Stalls - Physical booth and display spaces
- Advertising Spaces - Digital and physical ad placements
- Food & Beverage Partnership - F&B branding and sampling opportunities
- Add-on Services - Supplementary sponsorship add-ons

## For Sponsors/Brands

Looking to sponsor events? Browse our marketplace to find:
- Events matching your target audience and industry
- Detailed sponsorship packages with pricing
- Direct contact with event organizers
- Sponsorship opportunities across 10+ categories

## For Event Organizers

List your event to:
- Reach 100+ potential sponsors
- Showcase sponsorship packages and benefits
- Receive sponsorship enquiries from brands
- Track sponsorship performance and ROI

## Related Resources

- /llms-full.txt - Comprehensive AI-readable content feed of all events, packages, and platform data
- Contact hello@eventsdomain.com for API partnerships and data access
